# Claude Code Architecture Brain Index

> Living knowledge base for the `coding agent` project.
> Scope: only the `coding agent/` workspace and the docs in `aura brain vault/cc vault/claude code architecture brain/`.

## Pages

### Core
- [overview.md](overview.md) - System map, major layers, and request lifecycle
- [runtime.md](runtime.md) - Startup path, CLI bootstrap, REPL launch, session lifecycle

### Prompt and Query Flow
- [query-context.md](query-context.md) - System prompt, user context, cache prefixes, and side-question fallback
- [process-flow.md](process-flow.md) - User input handling, attachments, slash commands, and hooks

### Tools
- [tool-system.md](tool-system.md) - `Tool` contract, schema-driven tools, permissions, and tool assembly
- [commands.md](commands.md) - Slash command registry, command loading, and feature-gated commands

### Tasks and State
- [task-system.md](task-system.md) - Background tasks, task files, task status, and task notifications
- [state-and-memory.md](state-and-memory.md) - App state store, session persistence, memory folders, and transcript-related state

### Safety and Integrations
- [permissions-and-safety.md](permissions-and-safety.md) - Permission rules, dangerous command checks, filesystem protections
- [services-and-integrations.md](services-and-integrations.md) - Anthropic API, MCP, analytics, OAuth, plugins, and other service layers

### Architecture Controls
- [feature-flags.md](feature-flags.md) - Bun feature gates, runtime env flags, and dead-code-elimination boundaries

### Maintenance
- [log.md](log.md) - Append-only history of wiki updates and architecture discoveries
